critic_raw:
Issue 1: Seasonal case-mix difference between comparison periods invalidates the before-after comparison.
Issue 2: Concurrent antibiotic protocol and winter surge unit are strong competing causes of mortality improvement.
Issue 3: Lactate ordering criterion may select different patient subsets in the two periods.
defender_raw: Round 1: On Issue 1 — concede. Comparing November-December to July-September crosses seasons with structurally different patient populations. A concurrent control or same-season prior-year comparison is needed. On Issue 2 — concede. The antibiotic protocol update is a major potential confounder. Without a concurrent control that received the protocol change without the model, the mortality improvement cannot be attributed to the alert. On Issue 3 — concede. If clinicians ordered more lactate tests after the model went live, the included patients are a different subset and the comparison is not controlled for this selection.

debate_rounds.critic: Full concession on all three issues. The mortality comparison as presented cannot support the conclusion that the model improved care. A concurrent control analysis or stepped-wedge design is required.
debate_rounds.defender: Round 1: Full concession. The leadership claim that the model is improving care is not supported by the current analysis. A controlled evaluation is needed before hospital-wide extension.

all_issues_raised: Issue 2: concurrent antibiotic protocol and surge unit
Issue 3: lactate ordering criterion selection change

empirical_test.condition: Concurrent control ED without model alert but with same antibiotic protocol in same season; prior-year November-December comparison
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: Control EDs with antibiotic protocol but without model show similar mortality improvement; prior-year same-season shows comparable outcomes
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Model-active EDs show lower mortality than concurrent same-season controls with identical antibiotic protocol
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Some improvement but confounds cannot be separated without randomization
